{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Scourge Warrens
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Scourge Warrens]] are underground factories used by the [[Iron Legion]] to infest planets.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Scourge Warrens]] killed thousands of people across a continent in a half hour.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
